subject: Fix doc of AAF/certservice (frankfurt)
commit_message:
Fix doc of AAF/certservice (frankfurt)

Change master commit revision to frankfurt revision

Issue-ID: AAF-1152
Signed-off-by: Tomasz Wrobel <tomasz.wrobel@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I450d3e1a47d2cf902bdcd434ce5373eef5d76191

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/rtdv3-global-verify-master/1892/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/rtdv3-global-verify-master/1892

Patch Set 1:

Frankfurt doc page is using deprecated master commit revision (last update 24 April). I think it should using commit revision from Frankfurt branch.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hi, Can you show me a link to the problem?
I think that this patch may be the fix. https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/doc/+/109624

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Hi, Can you show me a link to the problem?
> I think that this patch may be the fix. https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/doc/+/109624

Hi,
Please, check this link:
https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-aaf-certservice/en/latest/index.html#master-index
It is no possibility to choose frankfurt document page, just latest and stable are provided. Second issue is in stable version which is confusing, e.g. Installation information was provided in commit: 
146fb3d56b080e0f22b6d4c83dbd7c3b2992bc3d
but is no visible in stable description (https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-aaf-certservice/en/stable/sections/installation.html).

> but is no visible in stable description (https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-aaf-certservice/en/stable/sections/installation.html).

Hi,

looking at your changes on the frankfurt branch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/q/project:aaf%252Fcertservice+branch:frankfurt
It appears that this merge job failed. https://jenkins.onap.org/job/rtdv3-global-merge-master/843/console I see that you tried to retrigger and It did not catch. The root problem that casued this was a shift of the read the docs version 3 api under out feet. this has been fixed and deployed, so this should not happen in the future. The frankfurt version is building now and should be selectable shortly. Sorry for the confusion. please abandon this patchset.
